# SnappyWorks Gardening

> Professional gardening and outdoor maintenance services in Geelong, Victoria, Australia.

## Services
- Lawn Mowing
- Garden Weeding
- Pressure Cleaning
- Hedge Trimming
- Garden Maintenance
- Garden Clean-Ups

## Service Areas
Geelong and surrounding suburbs including Newtown, Highton, Belmont, Grovedale, Waurn Ponds, Ocean Grove, Torquay, Lara, Corio, Leopold, Clifton Springs, Drysdale, Armstrong Creek, and Mount Duneed.

## Contact
- Phone: 0400 000 000
- Email: hello@snappyworkgardening.com.au
- Hours: Mon-Sat 7am-6pm
- Website: https://snappyworkgardening.com.au
- Quote: https://snappyworkgardening.com.au/quote

## About
Locally owned and operated gardening business serving Geelong since 2024. We offer reliable, quality gardening services with fair, upfront pricing and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
